message:
fix(codegen): fix ordered scan loop target for bounded prefix scans, remove unused helpers, and add boundary recheck test

codegen.rs:
- Fix loop_body target for bounded prefix scans: Next must jump
  back to the IdxGT boundary check (loop_start) not past it
  (loop_start+1), otherwise rows outside the equality-prefix
  duplicate run could be returned when the cursor crosses the
  prefix boundary mid-iteration
- Fix indentation of IdxGT block (was 8 spaces, should be 4)
- Remove unused index_key_cmp_p5 and index_key_collation_p4
  helper functions — the equality prefix comparisons now use
  per-column Ne guards emitted inline in the scan loop

codegen.rs (new test):
- test_codegen_ordered_scan_with_composite_equality_rechecks_
  prefix_boundary_each_next: builds SELECT id, idx, content FROM
  messages WHERE conversation_id=?1 ORDER BY idx ASC, verifies
  Next.p2 targets the IdxGT boundary address and the composite
  autoindex is opened

compat/connection.rs:
- Formatting cleanup: import reorder, vec literal compaction,
  closure formatting for query_map_collect calls
- New #[ignore] machine-local repro test: query_rowid_lookup_
  real_cass_db_repro for rowid-based single-row lookup on real
  CASS databases

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update bd-wwqen.2 and bd-wwqen.4 issue comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
